familySummaries.title: Token Creation
familySummaries.notes: Large practical seam spanning straightforward token creation, tapped/token modifier variants, and delayed cleanup follow-ups.

queue.notes: Large practical seam spanning straightforward token creation, tapped/token modifier variants, and delayed cleanup follow-ups.
queue.name: Ajani's Chosen
queue.clause: Whenever an enchantment you control enters, create a 2/2 white Cat creature token.

queue.name: Druid's Deliverance
queue.clause: (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

queue.name: Herd Baloth
queue.clause: Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on this creature, you may create a 4/4 green Beast creature token.

queue.name: Stormsplitter
queue.clause: Haste Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create a token that's a copy of this creature. Exile that token at the beginning of the next end step.

queue.name: Baron Bertram Graywater
queue.clause: Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, create a 1/1 black Vampire Rogue creature token with lifelink.

queue.name: Notorious Throng
queue.clause: Create X 1/1 black Faerie Rogue creature tokens with flying, where X is the damage dealt to your opponents this turn.

queue.name: Hanweir Garrison
queue.clause: Whenever this creature attacks, create two 1/1 red Human creature tokens that are tapped and attacking.

queue.name: Howlsquad Heavy
queue.clause: At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token.

queue.name: Patron of the Arts
queue.clause: When this creature enters or dies, create a Treasure token.

queue.name: Soaring Lightbringer
queue.clause: Whenever you attack a player, create a 1/1 white Glimmer enchantment creature token that's tapped and attacking that player.

queue.name: Torens, Fist of the Angels

queue.name: Curse of Disturbance

queue.name: Mardu Siegebreaker
queue.clause: Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent, create a tapped token that's a copy of the exiled card attacking that opponent.

queue.name: Kura, the Boundless Sky
queue.clause: • Create an X/X green Spirit creature token, where X is the number of lands you control.

queue.name: Bottle-Cap Blast
queue.clause: If excess damage was dealt to a permanent this way, create that many tapped Treasure tokens.
